pages.text: $(bold)The Nanosuit Leggings$() enhance your lower body with nano-reinforced durability and mobility augmentation. Integrated into your body through NanoCreature fusion, they enable enhanced movement while protecting your legs and lower torso.$(br2)$(bold)Protection Level:$() Equivalent to Netherite
Lower body protection with integrated mobility enhancement modules.

$(bold)Enhancements:$()$(br)- $(bold)Increased Speed:$() Faster movement and sprint duration$(br)- $(bold)Fall Protection:$() Significantly reduces fall damage$(br)- $(bold)Muscle Augmentation:$() Boost jumping and climbing capability

$(bold)Usage Tips:$()$(br)The leggings work synergistically with the helmet and boots for optimal performance. The full suit grants bonuses exceeding the sum of individual pieces when all are fused.$(br2)Wearing the leggings without the helmet reduces their effectiveness, as the command processing system needed for full motor augmentation is offline.
